prompt:
ROUGE VOGUE luxury beauty magazine cover

[SUBJECT]: A bold claymation woman with sculpted deep-red clay lips, dramatic cheekbones, and elegant porcelain-white clay skin. A large iridescent blue morpho butterfly with intricately textured clay wings rests delicately on her bare clay shoulder, creating a striking contrast between beauty and fantasy.

[COLORS]: Deep scarlet, midnight navy, luminous gold, porcelain white clay.

[KEY PROP]: Sleek gold metallic clay lipstick bullet case with a high-gloss finish, accompanied by a tiny sculpted red clay rose resting on a dark clay vanity surface.

[BACKGROUND]: Dramatic dark claymation studio featuring sweeping folds of midnight blue and black clay silk fabric cascading behind the subject, with tiny sculpted clay stars embedded throughout the backdrop.

[MOOD]: Bold, sensual, high-drama. Dark luxury claymation beauty campaign, rich saturated clay colors, theatrical editorial glamour, sophisticated fashion storytelling.

[CLAYMATION STYLE NOTES]: Butterfly wings crafted from layered translucent blue clay scales with iridescent shimmer, visible handcrafted clay textures, subtle sculpting marks, glossy lipstick finish, deep dramatic shadow play, cinematic lighting, Guillermo del Toro meets Laika Studios dark claymation aesthetic.

Magazine Masthead: ROUGE VOGUE
Headline: "One Shade. Infinite Power."

Tagline: "The Lip Color That Owns Every Room — The Bold Beauty Issue"

Brand Feature: SCARLETT NOIR — Velvet Matte Lip Collection
